items.name: Sausage Roll
items.description:
The Nation’s favourite Sausage Roll.

Much like Elvis was hailed the King of Rock, many have appointed Greggs as the (unofficial) King of Sausage Rolls.

Freshly baked in our shops throughout the day, this British classic is made from seasoned sausage meat wrapped in layers of crisp, golden puff pastry, as well as a large dollop of TLC. It’s fair to say, we’re proper proud of them.

And that’s it. No clever twist. No secret ingredient. It’s how you like them, so that’s how we make them.

items.name: Cold Sausage Roll (4 pack)
items.description: The Nation's favourite Sausage Roll, made from seasoned sausage meat and wrapped in layers of crisp, golden puff pastry.
items.servingInfo: Each Cold Sausage Roll (4 pack) (412g) contains:

items.name: Vegan Roll Pork-Free
items.description:
Deliciously light puff pastry with a seasoned Quorn™ filling.

The most hotly debated sausage roll since, well... the Sausage Roll.

Unless you were living under a very large, very heavy rock for most of 2019, you may have noticed we rustled up some serious feathers for Veganuary that year.

Our Vegan Roll Pork-Free is carefully designed to mirror some of the original Sausage Roll’s classic features, including around 96 layers of deliciously light puff pastry. If it aint broke, right?

BUT… instead we wrap it around our own bespoke filling, developed with the help of our friends over at Quorn™. And, in our humble opinion, it continues to be a gamechanger.

(There have been rare cases of allergic reactions to products containing Mycoprotein. Mycoprotein is made with a member of the fungi/mould family. It is high in protein and fibre which may cause intolerance in some people.)

items.name: Vegan Lattice Steak-Free
items.description:
It’s vegan, it’s steak-free… and it’s back.

Vegan-friendly Quorn mycoprotein pieces mixed with diced onions and a vegan-friendly gravy, wrapped in golden puff pastry. Still super tasty, just called something different.

It might just be what dreams are made of, if you dream of baked goods… and why wouldn’t you?

Returning to our shelves, the Vegan Lattice (Steak-Free) confirms what we already know: no meat DEFINITELY doesn’t have to mean no flavour.

(There have been rare cases of allergic reactions to products containing mycoprotein. Mycoprotein is made with a member of the fungi/mould family. It is high in protein and fibre which may cause intolerance in some people. Our Vegan Lattice Steak-free contains Rapeseed protein. As a food ingredient, this may cause allergic reactions to customers who are allergic to mustard and products thereof).

items.name: Cheese & Onion Bake
items.description:
A classic duo of cheese and onion wrapped in a light puff pastry.

Now, we’re not one for bold claims. We’d never, for example, claim that we invented the internet, or that we discovered France. So, we’re certainly not going to stamp our name on ‘cheese and onion’. After all, that tasty flavour combination has been around for ages.

But what we will say is, very few have managed to bundle the classic duo into a savoury quite like our Cheese and Onion Bake. Made with a blend of cheeses and diced onion, they’re freshly baked in our shops every day.

Fresh, simple, and with more cheese than a 90’s rom com. Perhaps it’s time you rediscovered this tasty classic.

items.name: Steak Bake
items.description:
Diced beef in a rich and tasty gravy, wrapped in a golden puff pastry parcel.

If you’re after a little taste of lunchtime lovin’ baked in the oven, then you’ve come to the right place.

Packed with diced cuts of prime beef in a rich and tasty gravy, this golden puff pastry parcel has been a firm favourite for years.

AND, since they’re freshly baked in our shops every day, there’s probably one coming out of the oven RIGHT now.

Unless you’re reading this at 4am. In which case, go to bed. And dream of tomorrow.

items.name: Chicken Bake
items.description:
Chicken breast pieces in a creamy white sauce with soft cheese, all wrapped up in golden puff pastry.

As a fully fledged Nation of bake lovers, we think it’s only fair we take a moment to shine the spotlight on this timeless classic.

Across Greggs’ many valiant years in the business of baking, we’ve seen our fair share of bakes come and go.

The Chicken Bake undoubtedly has stood the test of time. Always there. In the background. Never hogging the limelight, but always delivering the flavour.

Picture this: chicken breast pieces in a rich and creamy white sauce with soft cheese. These taste sensations are then wrapped in golden puff pastry making them the perfect choice for eating anywhere, at any time.

items.name: Sausage, Bean & Cheese Melt
items.description:
Sausages, beans and melted cheese wrapped in a golden puff pastry.

Some things were made for each other. Strawberries and cream… Ant and Dec… burgers and gherkins …well, maybe not everything.

But there’s one thing that nobody can deny, and it’s that sausages, beans and cheese are a match made in pastry heaven.

Bursting with delectable baked beans, our sausage meatballs, and gloriously gooey melted cheese, we can just about guarantee that our Sausage Bean and Cheese Melt will tickle your tastebuds.
items.servingInfo: Each Sausage, Bean & Cheese Melt (149.4g) contains:

items.name: Vegetable Bake
items.description:
Filled with a delicious mix of vegetables, in a creamy sauce made with Cheddar cheese and chillies, lovingly wrapped in our classic flakey, golden puff pastry.

Packed full of broccoli, cauliflower, green beans, potato, mixed peppers, leeks, onion, peas, and sweetcorn – it’s a lot like the shopping list you write just for it all to expire in your fridge.

They’re freshly baked in our shops every day, so the chances are there’s one coming out of the oven as we speak…

items.name: Customise Your Pizza
items.description:
Customise your own Greggs Pizza with a choice of toppings. Just when you thought it couldn’t get any better than our legendary Pizza slices… Introducing the brand new, customisable Pizza (Greggs-style!)

Inspired by our Italian cousins, our Pizza slices are made from focaccia style bases with a rich layer of our unique recipe pizza sauce and topped with delicious cheese.

On top of the tomato and cheese base, you can also choose to add three additional tasty toppings, including Mexican Chicken, Pepperoni, Red Onion, Jalapenos and Mixed Peppers.

If that’s not enough to have you saying ‘Magnifico!’, we don’t know what is.

items.name: Margherita Pizza
items.description:
A blend of cheeses on a tomato focaccia style base.

Creative bunch, the Italians. Not only were they famous for aqueducts and mascarpone cheese, they’re also responsible for the greatest bready creation since... well, sliced bread!

So, if there were ever a time to pat the Italians on the back and thank them for creating such exceptional eats, it’s now.

Our Margherita Pizza has a blend of cheeses on a focaccia style base. Plus, the sauciest pizza sauce that you ever did taste. If that doesn’t make you want to kiss your fingers and shout ‘Magnifico!’, we don’t know what will.

items.name: Pepperoni Pizza
items.description:
Focaccia style pizza with a blend of cheeses and sliced pepperoni.

Clever bunch, the Italians. Not only were they famous for ice cream and opera singing, they’re also responsible for the greatest bready creation since... well, sliced bread.

So, if there were ever a time to pat the Italians on the back and thank them for creating such exceptional eats, it’s now.

Inspired by our Italian cousins, our focaccia style Pepperoni Pizza has a rich layer of our unique recipe pizza sauce, covered in a blend of cheeses with sliced pepperoni. Magnifico!

items.name: Chicken, Sweetcorn & Red Onion Pizza
items.description:
Tasty pizza is officially in season and the forecast is looking cheesy with a chance of stomach rumbling.

Feast your eyes on our new Chicken, Sweetcorn & Red Onion Pizza – a focaccia style pizza with a tasty trio of toppings. Think gooey cheese, rich pizza sauce, succulent sliced chicken, crunchy sweetcorn and peppery red onion.

Now, this isn’t a "try not to drool" challenge but if it were, we would’ve lost big time. Grab a single slice (or four… or six) and see for yourself how jam-packed with flavour we can make it.

items.name: Free Range Egg Mayo Sandwich
items.description:
Soft malted brown bread with sliced egg, mayonnaise, and salad cream

If you’ve forgotten how good an Egg Mayonnaise Sandwich can be, perhaps it’s time to rediscover this tasty classic.

Sticking to the classic recipe, we combine egg mayonnaise with salad cream and slices of free range egg with just a pinch of black pepper. Sandwiched in our own soft malted brown bread, it’s a delicious blast from the past. No fuss. No fancy ingredients.

We’re also proud owners of a Good Egg Award, so you can rest safe knowing our eggy goodness has been well looked after. The Good Egg Award ensures hens lead a cage-free life, allowing them to express their natural behaviours – freedom to move, to scratch and peck, to dust bathe, to stretch and flap their wings, to walk, to run and to rest.

items.description:
To lick the lid or not to lick the lid? When it comes to our new Fat Free Greek Style Yoghurt with Strawberry Compote, you’ll have no choice but to cave in to temptation.

Picture this: a rich and thick Greek style yoghurt layered on top of a fruity strawberry compote. Small but mighty – this little pot of gold may just be the highlight of your lunch and the star of all your dreams after just one mouthful.

It’s stomach-rumbling, mouth-watering, plate-smashingly good.

items.name: Caramel Custard Doughnut
items.description:
Flavour-filled doughnut with custard style filling, topped with a sweet caramel flavour fondant.

There’s no denying we’re a nation of custard lovers. This gloriously versatile, school dinner favourite can be added to pretty much any dessert to take it from 0-100, and our Caramel Custard Dougnut is no exception.

A taste sensation for anyone with a sweet tooth.

items.name: Glazed Ring Doughnut
items.description:
A delicious ring doughnut covered in a sugar glaze. Our classic Glazed Ring Doughnut is vegan friendly, so it can be enjoyed by even more of you lovely lot. What a time to be alive.

And, lucky for you, there’s probably one being carefully placed on a Greggs shelf near you, right now. Go, go, go!

items.name: Glazed Ring Doughnut (2 pack)
items.description:
Vegan friendly ring doughnut with glazed fondant icing. You wanted them, and you’ve got them. We’ve made our classic Glazed Ring Doughnut vegan friendly, so it can be enjoyed by even more of you lovely lot. What a time to be alive.

And, aside from being the sweet, innocent younger cousin of the rebellious Vegan Sausage Roll, our Vegan Friendly Glazed Ring Doughnut has kept all the splendour of its original counterpart, with a perfect dollop of delicious glazed fondant icing.

But, enough about our doughnut wizardry. There’s probably one being carefully placed on a Greggs shelf near you, right now. Go, go, go!
items.servingInfo: Each Glazed Ring Doughnut (2 pack) (116g) contains:

items.name: Pink Jammie Doughnut
items.description:
Doughnut filled with apple and raspberry jam, topped with a pink decorative icing.

Jam Doughnuts are pretty great and all, but we promise this is a far superior way to enjoy a sweet treat. We’re just pointing out that alone, jam just doesn’t taste quite as amazing (don’t @ us). So, we’ve done something about that.

Our Pink Jammie Doughnut tastes just as UN-believable as our classic Jam Doughnut with our classic apple and raspberry jam, except we’ve topped it with delectable pink decorative icing for an even more elite doughnutting experience.

items.name: Sugar Strand Doughnut
items.description:
Soft ring doughnut with fondant icing and sugar strands.

Ahhh, now this one always gets us a tiny bit nostalgic. The Greggs Sugar Strand Doughnut has been on Greggs’ shelves since what feels like the beginning of time. It’s seen us through the good, the bad, and the ugly. And, the best part; it still tastes bloomin’ AH-mazing.

AND, it’s a known fact that sharing a lil’ snap of this on the ‘gram is guaranteed to get those likes rolling in. Because, hello... it’s pink. This deliciously soft ring doughnut is decorated with fondant and coloured sugar strands.

items.name: Triple Chocolate Doughnut
items.description:
Packed full of delicious chocolatey flavours like our white and dark chocolate curls, dark chocolate flavour icing and vanilla flavour filling.

That’s right, just in case one type of chocolate wasn't enough, our skilled doughnut inventors have packed three chocolatey flavours into one fabulously scrumptious doughnut.

There's nothing better for a mid-afternoon treat!

items.name: Yum Yum (2 pack)
items.description:
A pillow-soft doughnut twist covered in a sugar glaze. A small step for the dessert world, a big step for mankind, and the extraordinary taste of the Greggs Yum Yum is powerful enough to change the world.

Surprise, surprise, we’re daydreaming about food again, but this one is TOO good not to shout about.

Perfectly covered in a delicious sugar glaze, this doughnut is just about enough to get anyone in a twist (get it?).

We highly recommend it with hot cup of tea - guaranteed to put a smile on your face. Yum!

items.name: Belgian Buns (2 pack)
items.description:
A soft fruit bun, tangy apricot jam topped with fondant icing.

If you haven’t tried one of these then

1) WHERE have you been?

and

2) Can we ever be friends?

We’ve made your sweet dreams come true with a soft fruit bun, lemon flavoured pieces, wonderfully soaked sultanas, tangy apricot jam, topped with fondant icing… AND a cherry on top. Splendid.

items.name: Jammy Heart Biscuit
items.description:
Shortbread biscuit and a raspberry jam filling.

Our Jammy Heart Biscuits are a combination of delicious crumbly shortbread biscuit and a raspberry jam filling, fit for royalty.

5p from every biscuit goes to the Greggs Foundation, a grant-making trust, aiming to make a difference to people in need in the heart of our communities.

Learn more about all the good stuff they do here:

www.greggsfoundation.org.uk

items.name: Milk Chocolate Cookie
items.description:
Cookie made with milk chocolate chunks.

The validity of how good a cuppa is, is determined by which biscuit you’re dipping in it. FACT. So, make sure you do it right. But hell, our cookies are so good, we recommend ordering (and not sharing) every single last one.

Our milk chocolate cookies are soft, crumbly and are made with milk chocolate chunks, something for all chocolate lovers. Or, just ‘people’ as we like to call them. ‘Cause you know, who doesn’t like chocolate?

items.name: White Chocolate Cookie
items.description:
Cookie made with white chocolate chunks.

The validity of how good a cuppa is, is determined by which biscuit you’re dipping in it. FACT. So, make sure you do it right.

Our White Chocolate Cookies are soft, crumbly and made with white chocolate chunks, something for all chocolate lovers. Or, just ‘people’ as we like to call them. ‘Cause you know, who doesn’t like chocolate?

items.name: Triple Chocolate Cookie
items.description:
A delicious chocolate cookie packed with mouth-watering chunks of white and dark chocolate.

If you love chocolate, our Triple Chocolate cookies are about as chocolate-y as it gets. Honestly. Try one. You can thank us later.

items.name: Triple Chocolate Muffin
items.description:
Chocolate muffin with a rich centre of smooth chocolate flavoured sauce.

If you’re not fond of cake, chocolate and good times please look away now.

Being the purveyors of the finest baked goods, we’re pretty much hard-wired to LOVE getting our feed on with delicious, flavour-dense snacks.

The Triple Chocolate Muffin certainly fits the bill: with chunks of moreish chocolate, this decadent chocolate muffin has a rich centre of smooth chocolate flavoured sauce.

Go chocolate or go home, we say.

items.name: Lemon Meringue Muffin
items.description:
When life gives you lemons, cram them into a soft and succulent muffin designed to make your mouth water.

In fact, if the word "lemon" doesn’t make you drool then look away now. Introducing: our new Lemon Meringue Muffin. A soft lemon flavour muffin with lemon flavoured pieces and a sweet and tangy lemon filling, topped with a lemon flavoured fondant and crumbled meringue pieces.

It’s simply delicious. Don’t believe us? Put it to the zest.

items.name: Novelty Bun
items.description:
Vanilla flavour fairy bun with fondant icing, sprinkles and sugar paste plaque.

If there’s one thing that will propel you back to blissful childhood and memories of simpler times - it’s the Greggs classic Novelty Bun. A sweet-smelling vanilla flavour fairy bun, dipped in fondant icing and topped with sprinkles and sugar paste. It really doesn’t get much better.

items.name: Caramel Shortbread (4 pack)
items.description:
Delicious shortbread with caramel, topped with milk chocolate.

The perfect sweet and crumbly treat to go with your afternoon cuppa!

Our four pack of delightfully crumbly Shortbreads are topped with melt in the mouth caramel with a milk chocolate coating.

*nutrition is based on per shortbread

items.name: Gingerbread Man
items.description:
A human shaped crunchy gingerbread biscuit decorated with chocolate sweets.

Just like chocolate tastes better when it’s egg-shaped (fact), gingerbread tastes infinitely better when it’s shaped like a miniature human. Don’t ask us why. We don’t make the rules.

items.name: Star Biscuit
items.description:
Crunchy star shaped biscuit coated in milk chocolate and topped with sugar sprinkles.

When it comes to our sweet range, this one's the star of the show. Try one yourself – it’ll be sure to bring a smile to your face.

items.name: Chocolate Brownie Bar
items.description:
Chocolate brownie with dark chocolate, milk chocolate and white chocolate.

Go on – get yourself a little treat.

items.name: Free Range Egg Pot
items.description:
Putting the eggs in Greggs? We’ve cracked it.

Meet our Free Range Egg Pot. Perfectly boiled, conveniently peeled and free range because we care about happy hens. High in protein, low in drama and the perfect side to a sandwich and a drink.

Pre-gym? Sorted. Post-gym? Even better.

An ideal addition to the office lunchbox, the commute glovebox or the early-morning breakfast delivery haul when you’re not quite sure what will fill your feeds.

At the heart of any great Americano is a high quality, freshly ground espresso. Ours is made from our own unique blend of mild, high grown and rich tasting Arabica and Robusta beans.

Not only does it taste incredible but our coffee beans are 100% Fairtrade.

Tastes good. Does good.

items.name: Regular Cappuccino

If you’re anything like us, you’ll know that drinking coffee is infinitely more fun the frothier you go.

Think about it. Those teeny-tiny bubbles make your drink look just like a miniature bathtub, the chocolate powder on top is to die for, and don’t even get us started on the milk-stache…

Our Cappuccinos are made with freshly ground coffee, a generous helping of foam on top and dusted with chocolate powder.

The unique blend of mild, high grown and rich tasting Arabica and Robusta coffee mean that not only does it taste pretty darn delicious, but the beans are also 100% Fairtrade.

There are two things you should know about us:

1. We love food (obviously) 2. We absolutely love a good Latte

A double shot of freshly ground Fairtrade espresso and steamed milk? Absolutely.

A unique blend of mild, high grown and rich tasting Arabica and Robusta beans? You got it.

100% Fairtrade? Totally.

We really could sit and chat forever about the love and care that goes into producing our coffee, as well as the farmers that we support.

But, one thing’s for sure - this little cup of pick-me-up is made just the way you know and love.

Our coffee is 100% Fairtrade, and made from our own unique blend of mild, high grown and rich tasting Arabica and Robusta beans. That means it tastes good and does good.

Pick one up and let it fuel you in achieving great things – like, you know, getting through the morning commute.

items.name: Flat White
items.description:
If you’re the type of person looking for a ‘triple-decker-half-caffe- venti-macchiato’ with your name scribbled incorrectly on the side (it’s Greggs with two G’s, come on)… then we suggest you look away now.

Here at Greggs, we like to keep things simple. Quality products, great prices.

That’s why we love the Flat White. Admired by hipsters, grannies, and students alike. This fool-proof coffee order is our go-to crowd pleaser.

Double espresso, topped with steamed and lightly frothed milk. It's strong and served short, just how it's supposed to be.

Oh, and all of our coffee beans are 100% Fairtrade and freshly ground just for you.

We could go on and on about the love and care that goes into producing our coffee, as well as the farmers that we support.

We could talk about our own unique blend of mild, high grown and rich tasting Arabica and Robusta beans.

We could say that each cup of Greggs coffee is freshly ground and served by our friendly colleagues morning, noon and night.

… but we won’t. It’s as simple as that, really.

items.name: Regular Hot Chocolate
items.description:
We love chocolate. And by ‘love’ we mean ‘are obsessed with’. But sometimes, a piece of chocolate just won’t cut it, you know?

That’s why we’ve turned up the heat, to give to you our deliciously decadent Fairtrade Hot Chocolate.

Deliciously decadent hot chocolate made with fat reduced Fairtrade cocoa powder.

Personally, it’s a fave of ours for any time of year.

…but if you’re experiencing a particularly wet and dreary day (let’s face it, it’s the UK), we can guarantee this will hit the spot.

Let it slowly melt in your mouth, and watch as those rose-tinted, chocolate-shaped endorphins magically reveal themselves. We just love to see all your pretty, smiley faces sipping on this cup of magic.

items.name: Sparkling Raspberry Lemonade
items.description:
A classic lemon and raspberry flavoured sparkling drink. The Sparkling Raspberry Lemonade.

Deliciously lemon and raspberry flavoured, this sweet, fruity and fizzy little bombshell delivers a splash of perfectly pink hue onto our shelves, making for the most Instagrammable soft drink on the Greggs menu. If you’re looking for an even bigger dose of pink, why not pair it with a Pink Jammie Doughnut?

Refreshing on a hot day, and just as tasty on a cold one; we loved it when we were kids, and we lurrrrve it even more now.

items.name: Small Orange Juice
items.description:
Ah, OJ… perfect for breakfast (or any meal, come to think of it).

Our Orange Juice is Fairtrade and made from concentrate.

The sharp, orangey flavours make for a punchy soft drink that treats your taste buds to a party!

The perfect contrast of sweet and sour, this fabulous looking and even better tasting concoction offers optimum flavour satisfaction… it’s top tier, to be honest.

(Recommended portion of Orange Juice counts as 1 of your 5-a-day. Orange Juice made from concentrate)

items.name: Fairtrade Apple Juice
items.description:
Sip sip, hurray!

We know you. We know you spent years leaving that apple in your lunchbox.

But, now you’ve truly come to appreciate the wonder of the flavour of apple. And good news, we’re here to make it even better.

Yes, it’s a classically refreshing Fairtrade Apple Juice.

A little sharp and super sweet, our Apple Juice is so classically refreshing that it doesn’t need the big sell.

Not only does it taste great, but our Apple Juice is one of your five a day (per 150ml) and 100% Fairtrade.

(Recommended 150ml portion of Apple Juice counts as 1 of your 5-a-day. Apple Juice made from concentrate)

It’s true what they say, not all crisps are created equally.

As a Greek philosopher once said, "the key is to keep company only with people who uplift you, and lovingly place Salt & Vinegar crisps into one’s mouth".

We think it was Epictetus. Or maybe Socrates. One of the big ones, anyway.

Either way, they were absolutely right.

But, don’t take their word for it. Head into your local shop and pick up a bag of these little guys. You won’t regret it.
